title: chore(enter-account): remove dead exports and dedupe usage/CSV/tinybird helpers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Remove dead `export default accountRoutes` and the unused `CustomerRoutes` type export
- Extract a shared `respondDetailedUsage` helper for the duplicated `/usage` and `/key/usage` bodies
- Hoist the duplicated 19-column CSV header into one constant
- Reuse `fetchTinybirdRows`/`requireTinybirdReadToken` from account.ts in customer.ts instead of an inline Tinybird fetch

Verified non-breaking: biome clean, affected tests green vs the main baseline. Net âˆ’11 lines.

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: Swept up some unused code and organized our internal helpers for a cleaner, more efficient codebase.
gist.summary: Refactored the account and customer routes to remove dead exports and deduplicate usage reporting, CSV headers, and Tinybird fetch logic.
gist.impact: Developers benefit from a cleaner, more maintainable codebase with shared helpers for CSV generation and Tinybird queries.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing and cleaning up a workspace, sweeping away old code blocks while Nomnom eats the discarded files.
